description: Keep code & metadata local. Offload heavy media to GCS. Sync configs to Google Drive.

local.description: Code, JSON metadata, agent configs — stays in the workspace

gcs.description: Heavy media artifacts — videos, high-res images, audio

gdrive.description: Conversation logs, workspace configs — synced via Antigravity Storage Manager

agent_instructions.pomelli: Save all generated high-res assets directly to the GCS bucket. Keep only thumbnail references (<200KB) locally.
agent_instructions.spyder: Save all crawl output to ./research/ as JSON. Do not store raw HTML locally.
agent_instructions.openclaw: Export campaign summaries as Markdown to ./campaigns/. Upload creative assets to GCS.
